description_long: This is a modern, mid-sized pickup truck with a four-door cab and a spacious rear cargo bed. The exterior is predominantly black with some gray accents, and the vehicle features a robust, utilitarian design typical of urban and suburban work vehicles. The truck has a set of four wheels with visible wheel wells and a slightly elevated chassis, suggesting off-road capability. The front grille and headlights are integrated into a streamlined fascia, while the rear includes a tailgate and rear lights. The windows are tinted, and the side mirrors are compact and functional. The overall build appears to be a mix of metal and glass, with plastic trim and rubber tires.
description: A black, four-door pickup truck with a rear cargo bed, robust build, and modern styling, suitable for urban and suburban environments.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the tailgate, rear lights, and the cargo bed.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the four-door cab, cargo bed, and wheel arrangement.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the grille, headlights, and front bumper.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the cab, cargo bed, and wheels.
